description: Agreement exists on the mission, but not on how much damage is acceptable to complete it.
flashback_hook: The moment someone asked, 'Is this still worth it?'

description: The presence of a Caitiff member creates political exposure and discomfort at Elysium.
flashback_hook: The first time an elder pretended one of them wasn’t there.

description: The Tracker operates independently, acting on instincts and results rather than formal command approval.
flashback_hook: The night orders were ignored—and the target was still eliminated.
